description: Heap security mitigations, checks, and bypass techniques

safe_linking.description: XOR-encode FD pointers to prevent pointer forgery

bypass.method: Leak heap address, compute XOR key

tcache_double_free_detection.description: Walk tcache list to detect if chunk already present
tcache_double_free_detection.mechanism: On free, iterate tcache list for matching size, check if chunk address matches any entry

bypass.method_1: Use different size (goes to different bin)
bypass.method_3: Overwrite tcache counts to skip check

tcache_double_free_detection.exploitation_impact: HIGH - breaks simple double-free into tcache

fastbin_size_check.description: Verify returned chunk size matches fastbin index

bypass.method: Ensure target address - 16 has valid size matching fastbin index
bypass.example: To allocate at 6291456, need valid 112 size at 393200

prev_inuse_check.description: Check prev_inuse bit of next chunk before freeing
prev_inuse_check.exploitation_impact: CRITICAL - must handle when creating fake chunks

prev_size_check.description: If prev_inuse=0, verify prev_size matches actual previous chunk size
prev_size_check.error: corrupted size vs. prev_size while consolidating
prev_size_check.bypass: Set prev_inuse=1 OR ensure prev_size is correct
prev_size_check.exploitation_impact: CRITICAL - must handle when creating fake chunks

unlink_mitigation.description: Verify chunk size consistency during consolidation
unlink_mitigation.mechanism: chunksize(p) must equal prev_size of next chunk

house_of_corruption.description: Generic term for heap corruption attacks

house_of_spirit.description: Create fake chunk on stack, free it, then allocate at that address

house_of_force.description: Overwrite top chunk size to -1, allocate at arbitrary address

house_of_einherjar.description: Off-by-one to set prev_inuse=0, trigger consolidation

house_of_botcake.description: Combine tcache poisoning with unsorted bin attack

house_of_key.description: Leak heap key from tcache FD to bypass safe linking

SHSTK.impact: ROP chains targeting return addresses may fail

IBT.description: Indirect Branch Tracking - validates indirect jumps
IBT.impact: One-gadget execution may fail if not ENDBR64 aligned

bypass.method: Use gadgets that are ENDBR64 aligned
bypass.alternative: Target function pointers instead of return addresses
bypass.note: CET is binary-level protection, not glibc-level

hook_removal.impact: Traditional hook-based exploitation no longer works

scanf_malloc_consolidate.description: Large scanf input triggers malloc_consolidate, moving tcache to unsorted bin
scanf_malloc_consolidate.impact: Can be used to force libc leak without manual tcache fill
scanf_malloc_consolidate.bypass: Not a mitigation, but an exploitation primitive

index_confusion.description: Separate index variables for free and NULL operations can create UAF
index_confusion.mechanism: chunk_index_a != chunk_index_b allows freed chunk to remain accessible
index_confusion.bypass: Overflow index counter to create mismatch
index_confusion.exploitation_impact: HIGH - creates UAF from logic bug
